title: Python for Beginners
description: Learn Python step by step with beginner-friendly lessons and hands-on practice.
goals: navigate the editor, Run button, and terminal
explain the Input → Processing → Output model
understand Python syntax, comments, and common beginner errors
store and update values with variables and basic data types
use operators, expressions, strings, and formatted output
build mini-programs using input, conversion, computation, and output
use conditionals, loops, lists, and functions to structure beginner programs
